---
title: "Welcome to the Agroecology Blog"
author: "Alejandro Brambila"
date: "2026-01-15"
categories: [news]
---

This is the first post of our agroecology blog, where we'll occasionally be posting project and management updates. Stay tuned!

![Planting a native hedgerow with the Appleton and Powisset farm crews in 2024.](IMG_1613.jpeg)
